Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants an analysis of a loan application process based on a provided event log The analysis must distinguish between strict normative violations Part 1 and desiderata best practice deviations Part 2 I need to identify specific cases for each category explain why and suggest interpretations justifications

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Normative Rules Part 1 Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Ordering Rules Credit Check Risk Assessment Risk Assessment Loan Decision Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case If Rejected No Finalize Documentation before Close Case Prohibitions Skipping steps wrong order finalizing docs after rejection

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Desiderata Part 2 Credit Check should be within 24 hours of Application Received Inform Applicant should be within 48 hours of Loan Decision Follow up Call encouraged before closing optional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Case by Case Case 1 Trace Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Timing Same day flow Jan 10 0900 to 1400 Normative Check Order Correct Logic Approved Finalize Docs before Close Yes Desiderata Check Credit Check within 24h Yes 0900 to 0930 Inform Applicant within 48h Yes 1100 to 1300 Follow up call No Conclusion Fully compliant with normative rules Deviates from Follow up call desideratum optional

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Trace Application Received Risk Assessment Credit Check Loan Decision Rejected Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Check Order Risk Assessment 0820 happened before Credit Check 0900 Violation Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Logic Rejected Finalize Documentation 1000 happened Violation Do not finalize documentation after rejection Desiderata Check Irrelevant because normative rules are broken but timing seems fast Conclusion Major Normative Violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Trace Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Approved Inform Applicant Finalize Documentation Close Case Normative Check Order Correct sequence Logic Approved Finalize Docs Jan 17 before Close Case Jan 17 Yes Desiderata Check Application Received Jan 12 0900 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Time diff Jan 12 to Jan 14 is greater than 24 hours Violation Loan Decision Jan 14 1200 Inform Applicant Jan 16 1500 Time diff Jan 14 to Jan 16 is 2 days plus 3 hours 48 hours would be Jan 16 1200 1500 is greater than 48 hours Violation Follow up Call No Deviation Conclusion Compliant with Normative rules Multiple Desiderata violations

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure the Output Task 1 Normative Violations Focus on Case 2 Detail the ordering violation Risk Assessment before Credit Check Detail the logic violation Finalizing documentation after Rejection Task 2 Desiderata Deviations Focus on Case 3 and Case 1 regarding the follow up call Detail timing issues in Case 3 Credit Check greater than 24h Inform greater than 48h Mention missing Follow up Call in Case 1 and 3 Task 3 Interpretations Justifications Case 1 Standard efficient processing Case 2 Why the errors Perhaps a system glitch allowed Risk Assessment to start early or the agent made a mistake rejecting it then finalizing docs maybe a reversal of decision that was not logged or simple error Case 3 Why the delays Backlog weekend processing

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 2 Why the errors Perhaps a system glitch allowed Risk Assessment to start early or the agent made a mistake rejecting it then finalizing docs maybe a reversal of decision that was not logged or simple error

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Case 3 Why the delays Backlog weekend processing Jan 12 is Friday Jan 14 is Sunday Jan 16 is Tuesday This explains the greater than 24h delay for credit check waited for Monday work This adds good flavor to the interpretation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For Case 3 the prompt notes explicitly state Happened more than 24 hours later just a desideratum violation I must follow this classification For Case 2 the prompt notes explicitly state No prior Credit Check violates normative and Not allowed after rejection I must follow this classification
